title: 7 Pcs Birthday Candles Pink Blue Gradient Number Candles for Cakes Gold Glitter Birthday Candles Numbers Number 5 Candle Birthday Cake Candles for Girls Birthday Party Wedding Anniversary
features: 【Package Contents】 You will receive 1 number candles and 6 slim birthday candles in a gradient color from pink to blue, very elegant and dreamy looking. Birthday candles are individually packaged in plastic boxes to ensure optimal protection and avoid damage during shipping.

【Safe Material】 These birthday candles for cakes are made of high-quality paraffin material. birthday candles numbers are smokeless and portable. Easy to insert and light. They burn evenly and dont break down easily, so you can use them with confidence.

【Beautiful Appearance】 Our number candles for cakes have a beautiful pink-blue gradient design, and the candles are dotted with golden dots of different sizes, which makes them even more special and delicate, adding warmth and beauty to your cake.

【Product Size】 The number candles is about 4cm wide and the total length is about 10cm (the candle is about 6cm long). The slim candle is approximately 0.4cm wide and the total length is approximately 12.7cm (including candle). Please confirm the size carefully before ordering.

【Wide Application】 Our birthday candles numbers can be used on most occasions, such as birthday parties, wedding parties, proms, anniversaries, graduations, baby showers, Thanksgiving, Christmas and so on. (Note: Please store birthday candles in a cool place away from fire sources. Keep the candle away from children while burning.)
description: Product Description Light Up Every Age with Style and Colour Add a dreamy touch to every celebration with TAIXING birthday candles — elegant, smokeless, and made to shine on every cake. Thoughtfully Packaged Each candle set is individually boxed for protection — ready to gift or decorate. Elegant Gradient Design Featuring a soft pink-to-blue gradient with golden glitter details — a beautiful blend of elegance and fun. Premium & Safe Material Made from high-quality, smokeless paraffin wax. Burns cleanly and evenly, perfect for indoor use. Bring Colour, Warmth & Joy to Every Celebration TAIXING candles turn simple cakes into stunning centrepieces. Create magical birthday memories with soft hues, gentle light, and elegant design. TAIXING – Designed to Celebrate Every Moment From craftsmanship to colour, every TAIXING candle is made with love and care. We’re proud to be part of your happiest days — and every wish you make.
